publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-12-26 18:24:43 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Michael Shively's personal papers, including files from his work as Associate Director of the Center for Homosexual, Education, Evaluation, and Research (CHEER) at San Francisco State University, 1975-1980; his work for Liberation Publications Inc., which published the ADVOCATE, 1980-90; and his work at Damron Publishing since 1990.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Michael Shively's personal papers, including files from his work as Associate Director of the Center for Homosexual, Education, Evaluation, and Research (CHEER) at San Francisco State University, 1975-1980; his work for Liberation Publications Inc., which published the ADVOCATE, 1980-90; and his work at Damron Publishing since 1990.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Michael G. Shively papers, #7671. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Also goes by name Mikal Shively.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 7, folder 22 restricted until January 2051 or Pat Califia's death.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 17 restricted until 2025 or John DeCecco's death.

did.unittitle: Journal of Homosexuality (JH) Letterhead and Envelopes
Continuation Grant: Adaptation of Aging Men & Women
Thesis: The Identification of the Social Sex-Role Stereotypes
Thesis: The Effects of Social Sex-Role Stereotypes and Sexual Orientation on Psychotherapeutic Outcomes, Petra Liljestrand
Sexual Orientation Survey- SFSU- Work Folder
Sexual Orientation Survey- SFSU- Psych 674; Shively- Research on the Aspects & Dimensions of Sexual Orientation Coder's Tabulation Booklet
Grant Application: Developing the Homosexual Identity
"Sniffin' to Switchin'": Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Supplemental Report of Project Activities and Plans: Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Coding Manual for Sheriff's Department Personnel Interview Schedule: Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Informed Consent Form: Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
The Butch Camp: A Study of Communication in Two Gay Bars of Denver
Social Sex-Role Stereotypes (SSRS) and Assault in Jails
Report to Granting Agency on Progress of Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Development of Training Package for Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
An Information Package for Identifying and Protecting Potential Inmate-Victims of Sexual Assault
Study of Recorded Sex Assaults in the San Francisco County Jail
The Relationship of Previous Incarceration to the Prediction of Sexual Assault Victims in the San Francisco County Jail
Evaluation of Screening Procedures for Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Proposal: Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail: Three Month Trial Implementation Period
Bibliography: Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail
Characteristics Associated with Male Homosexuality within a State Correctional Population
Study and Prevention of Sexual Assault in the San Francisco County Jail: Results of Profile Study
Correspondence and Files Re: Book Manuscript with John P. DeCecco
Correspondence and Files Re: Book Manuscript with John P. DeCecco
Manuscript: The Heterosexual and Homosexual Identities: The Normalization of Sexual Relationships, by John P. DeCecco and Michael G. Shively, (preface, ch. 1-2)
C.H.E.E.R. CLIB Team, New York photo album
Computer Services, Shively's Job Description: Hardware and Operating Environment Maintenance Technician, Business Services Department
Malibu Sales & Malibu Man Sales Catalogs
Morrow Computer Materials- Running Under CPM (Enclosed Memorandum from Michael Shively)
Executive Retreat Materials- San Diego (photos included)
Executive Retreat Materials- Palm Springs (photos included)
Executive Retreat Materials- Santa Barbara (photos included)
Executive Retreat Materials- Corporate Offices- Hollywood Boulevard
New York Correspondence- General and Photos
Thesis Draft: Proofreading in the Dark and Other Stories, by Wendell Ricketts
Draft Copy: Melting Point, by Pat Califia
Damron Co. files: Web User Emails
Last will and testament of Dan Delbex, creating the Delbex/Damron Trust
Sample web administrator letters - user questions

scopecontent.p: Promotional item sent to Damron mail order for possible sale

scopecontent.p: Signed by the artist, numbered 203/1000 | CR1001
